---
name: Marketplace Module Request
about: Request a new marketplace module or integration
title: "[MODULE] "
labels: marketplace, enhancement
---

## Pain Point
What business problem does this module solve?

## Proposed Module
Describe the module you'd like to see built.

## Vertical
Which vertical(s) need this module?
- [ ] Med Spa
- [ ] Home Services
- [ ] Other (specify):
- [ ] All verticals

## Pricing Expectation
What would you be willing to pay monthly for this module?
- [ ] $29-49 (small feature)
- [ ] $99-199 (major feature)
- [ ] $299+ (enterprise)

## Additional Context
Any specific integrations, tools, or workflows this module should support.
